title: Atlanta Jazz Festival
description: 49th annual free jazz festival in Piedmont Park featuring Christian McBride and Ursa Major. Three days of world-class jazz, food vendors, and a fantastic outdoor atmosphere perfect for a picnic date.

title: Atlanta Jazz Festival Day 2
description: Memorial Day weekend jazz festival continuation. Bring a blanket, pack some snacks, and enjoy live jazz under the open sky. One of Atlanta's most beloved annual traditions.

title: Atlanta Jazz Festival Day 3
description: Final day of the 49th Annual Atlanta Jazz Festival. The perfect low-pressure, high-vibe date — free admission, great music, and beautiful park setting.

title: Virginia Highland Farmers Market
location: Highland Woodworking, 1045 North Highland Ave NE, Atlanta
description: A charming Sunday morning market in the heart of Virginia Highland. Browse fresh produce, artisanal goods, and support local vendors together. Great way to start a relaxed weekend date.

title: Poetic Jazz: A Jazzy Artist Talk
description: Conversation and culture collide at this intimate jazz event. Features live jazz paired with artist discussion — intellectual and soothing. Perfect for couples who love art and music.

title: Marcus D. Wiley – Helium Comedy Club
description: Hilarious stand-up from Marcus D. Wiley. Comedy clubs make fantastic date nights — shared laughter builds connection, plus there's a full bar and food menu.

title: Marcus D. Wiley – Helium Comedy Club (Late Show)
description: Saturday night comedy show at Helium. Great energy, solid drinks, and guaranteed laughs. One of Atlanta's best date night options.

title: Casita Nights – Salsa & Bachata Social
description: A fun, welcoming salsa and bachata social night in Lawrenceville. No partner needed — it's a friendly crowd. Dance the night away together! Great for couples who want to move and have fun.

title: Like Glue Fridays – Reggae, Afrobeat & Dancehall
location: Suite Lounge, 375 Luckie St NW, Atlanta
description: Atlanta's premier weekly international music night featuring reggae, soca, Afrobeat, and dancehall. New dance floor, great vibes, and a fun crowd. A very date-worthy night out for couples who love to dance.

title: Latin Vibes – Tago Life Center
description: Feel the heat and move your feet at Tropical Latin Night. Passport to sizzling rhythms and vibrant energy with non-stop dancing. Great date energy with food and drink available.

title: Jess Hilarious – Helium Comedy Club
description: Comedian Jess Hilarious brings her high-energy humor to Atlanta. Friday night show = perfect date night setup. Helium has great seating and a solid dinner menu.

title: Jess Hilarious – Helium Comedy Club (Saturday Show)
description: Saturday night show with Jess Hilarious. Back-to-back weekend shows. A comedy date is always a winner — share some nachos and laugh together.

title: AFRO BEAT & Caribbean Vibes – Tago Life Center
description: Tropical Vibes Night brings the best of Afrobeat and Caribbean music together. Indoor venue with a great dance floor, food, and drinks. Perfect for couples who love rhythm.

title: Friday Jazz – High Museum of Art
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Live jazz at the High Museum every third Friday — art, music, and cocktails in one of Atlanta's most beautiful venues. VIP option includes exclusive access to the Amy Sherald exhibition. Very civilized date night.

title: Salsa Social – Callanwolde Fine Arts Center
description: A night of Cuban music and dancing at the historic Callanwolde mansion. One of Atlanta's most romantic dance venues. Beginner-friendly atmosphere with a welcoming crowd.

title: Roots + Remix – Juneteenth Experience
description: A Juneteenth celebration of design, identity, and sound presented by Spread Love and African Ancestry. Live music, art, culture, and community — a meaningful and vibrant date experience.

title: Afropiano Kingdom – Underground Atlanta
description: Two-day Afropiano experience in the heart of Underground Atlanta. Dance to the rhythms of amapiano, Afrobeat, and more. Great energy, outdoor setting, and perfect summer vibes.

title: Reggae on the Rooftop Festival – Juneteenth Weekend
description: Rooftop reggae festival for Juneteenth weekend. Kick back with good vibes, tropical drinks, and reggae music under the Atlanta sky. A unique and memorable date experience.

title: Steph Tolev – Helium Comedy Club
description: Steph Tolev brings her sharp, fun energy to Helium. Friday night show at one of Atlanta's best comedy venues. Great drinks, good food, and a solid laugh — reliable date night pick.

title: Amy Sherald: American Sublime – High Museum of Art
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: The most comprehensive exhibition to date for Georgia native Amy Sherald, now at the High Museum of Art for its final stop on a national tour. Stunning portraits that explore identity and American life. Perfect cultured date afternoon.
